title: Minimum Cost to Hire K Workers
hints: Focus on the ratio wage[i]/quality[i]. If you pick a group, which worker's ratio determines the actual pay rate for everyone?
Sort workers by their wage-to-quality ratio in ascending order. Iterate through them, treating each as the one setting the pay rate.
As you iterate, maintain a collection of the K smallest qualities seen so far using a max-heap to minimize the cost sum.
